name: python3-poetry-dynamic-versioning
title: python3-poetry-dynamic-versioning
summary: dynamic versioning Python plugin for Poetry
description:
dynamic versioning Python plugin for Poetry
This package is a plugin for Poetry to enable dynamic versioning based on tags
in your version control system, powered by Dunamai.
.
Many different version control systems are supported, including Git and
Mercurial.

arguments.description: Dynamic versioning plugin for Poetry may be
arguments.raw: -dynamic-versioning  Dynamic versioning plugin for Poetry may be

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use poetry-dynamic-versioning because dynamic versioning Python plugin for Poetry.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use poetry-dynamic-versioning as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `poetry-dynamic-versioning [-h] {enable,show} ...` as documented upstream for poetry-dynamic-versioning.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair poetry-dynamic-versioning with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `poetry-dynamic-versioning --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
